supported_devices: Bluelab PeriPod M3/M4/L3 dosing systems (external, required for dosing), Bluelab PowerPod (optional, for temperature switching), Bluelab Alarm Box
port_types: BNC pH probe, conductivity probe, temperature probe, PeriPod dosing cable, PowerPod cable, alarm box cable, USB port for Connect Stick
compatible_sensors: Bluelab pH probe (BNC), Bluelab temperature probe, Bluelab conductivity probe
recommended_use_note: Full pH, EC, and temperature monitoring with automated multi-nutrient dosing; up to 12 nutrient channels via daisy-chained PeriPods; remote data logging via Bluelab Connect (Connect Stick sold separately)
uvp_notes: EU retailer price (growmart.eu) including 19% VAT, listed as 'Bluelab Pro Controller' (Connect version). JJSTech lists at $1,399 USD. Not sold on eu.bluelab.com (only Wi-Fi version at €1,560 listed there).
notes: Model CONTPRO. No built-in pump — requires external Bluelab PeriPod for all dosing (controller ships as 'base only, no pump'). Monitors and controls pH, EC (conductivity), and temperature. Can dose both pH-up and pH-down simultaneously via separate PeriPod channels, plus up to 12 nutrient channels total (3× PeriPod M4 at 4 pumps each). pH range 0.1-13.9, accuracy ±0.1. EC range 0-4.9 EC / 0-49 CF / 0-2450 ppm 500 / 0-3430 ppm 700, accuracy ±0.1 EC. Temperature 1-59°C, accuracy ±1°C. Optional temperature control via Bluelab PowerPod accessory (switches heater or chiller). Remote monitoring and data logging via Bluelab Connect Stick (sold separately; 2.4 GHz ISM proprietary protocol) and free Bluelab Connect PC/mobile software. Visual high/low alarms; external lockout/alarm box port. Probe cable 2 m/6.5 ft. International power supply (100-240V AC). 2-year device warranty, 6-month pH probe warranty. Made in New Zealand. Being superseded by Pro Controller Wi-Fi (eu.bluelab.com €1,560) but still actively sold through distributors.
